name: Chemical-Resistant Nitrile Gloves
shortDescription: Flock-lined nitrile for solvent, acid and oil handling.
longDescription: Flock-lined nitrile gloves resist a broad range of solvents, acids, alkalis and oils while remaining comfortable for extended wear. Standard issue for chemical decanting, plant cleaning and effluent handling. Supplied with a chemical permeation reference so you can match the glove to the substance on your MSDS.

images.alt: Chemical-Resistant Nitrile Gloves supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
